name: NOFILTER 7D HIFU
shortDescription: The NOFILTER 7D is a professional dual-function device combining 7D HIFU and microneedle radio frequency (RF) technology. 7 HIFU cartridges (1.5–13 mm), 4 RF heads. Non-surgical facelift, skin rejuvenation, and body sculpting.
description:
The NOFILTER 7D is an advanced, dual-function professional device that combines HIFU (High-Intensity Focused Ultrasound) and microneedle radio frequency (RF) technology in a single system.

Thanks to the combined effect, it works simultaneously on the deep and surface layers of the skin, visibly firming, lifting, and renewing the skin – without surgical intervention.

HIFU deeply firms and lifts, while microneedle RF renews and regenerates the surface. The result is a natural, gradually developing lifting effect and lasting firmness.
metaTitle: NOFILTER 7D HIFU + Microneedle RF | Non-Surgical Facelift | Skinlab Hungary
metaDescription: NOFILTER 7D HIFU + microneedle RF device. 7-depth HIFU cartridges, 4 RF heads. Non-surgical facelift, body sculpting, skin rejuvenation. With FAR training.

videoDescription.headline: NOFILTER 7D – when you believe in aesthetics, not filters
paragraphs: The NOFILTER 7D combines HIFU and microneedle RF technologies to provide a comprehensive, multi-layer rejuvenating effect. HIFU targets the deeper layers of the skin – including the SMAS layer – while microneedle RF renews the surface layers.

It includes 7 different-depth HIFU cartridges and 4 microneedle RF heads, making it applicable to nearly every area of the face and body – from fine eye-area wrinkles to treating deep abdominal fat pads.
Clients are increasingly seeking non-surgical facelift solutions. With the NOFILTER 7D, you too can offer this service – at a professional level with impressive results.

featureRows.headline: Why is the NOFILTER 7D the professional choice?
featureRows.subtitle: 7D HIFU + microneedle RF – comprehensive skin rejuvenation and body sculpting

features.title: 7D HIFU – 7 depths, 7 possibilities
features.description:
The NOFILTER 7D includes seven different-depth HIFU cartridges that work precisely in different layers of the skin. Each cartridge is capable of 10,000 shots.

HIFU cartridges:

DL 1.5 mm – eye area, forehead, fine wrinkles
DL 3.0 mm – face, cheekbone, perioral area firming
DL 4.5 mm – SMAS layer, classic HIFU lifting
MF 2.0 mm – pigmentation spots, pores, fine lines
MF 6.0 mm – body sculpting on arms, abdomen, hips
MF 9.0 mm – deep body treatment (abdomen, thighs, waist)
MF 13.0 mm – deep fat layer, cellulite treatment

features.title: Microneedle RF treatment heads – surface renewal and regeneration
features.description:
The microneedle RF treatment heads work at different needle densities and depths, allowing treatment intensity to be personalized.
Nano head – needle-free RF, skin renewal, hydrating active ingredient delivery
10 Pin head – sensitive areas (eye area, perioral area)
25 Pin head – general facial treatment, collagen stimulation
64 Pin head – body treatment (abdomen, thighs, arms), cell renewal
comprehensive skin renewalcollagen stimulationcustomizable intensity

features.title: Comprehensive effect – deep-layer lifting and surface renewal combined
features.description:
The combination of two technologies gives the NOFILTER 7D its unique power: providing a comprehensive, multi-layer rejuvenating effect.
HIFU – deeply firms and lifts (SMAS layer)
Microneedle RF – renews and regenerates the surface
Natural, gradually developing lifting effect
Improved skin structure and lasting firmness
Without scalpels, injections, or lengthy recovery time

features.title: Treatment options – from face to body
features.description:
The NOFILTER 7D's versatility makes it applicable to numerous areas of the face and body.
Face, double chin, and neck firming
Wrinkle reduction (fine and deep)
Skin texture and tone improvement
Body contouring
Post-pregnancy skin firming
Pigmentation and pore refinement

features.description:

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: An officially registered, FAR-system training course is available for the professional use of the NOFILTER 7D device. The goal of the course is for participants to master the safe and effective application of HIFU and microneedle RF treatments at both theoretical and practical levels.
items: Operating principles and mechanisms of HIFU and RF technology
Exact application areas and settings for each HIFU cartridge
Correct use of microneedle RF heads and intensity settings
Treatment protocols for various skin types and concerns
Client consultation and treatment diary management
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official, personalized certificate generated in the FAR system with a B-number.
If you're interested in the training opportunity, please contact us through any of our channels to arrange an appointment!

testimonials.name: Takács Vivien
testimonials.text: The NOFILTER 7D is exactly what I needed: <mark>HIFU and microneedle RF in one device</mark>. The 7-depth HIFU cartridges allow me to treat everything from the eye area to abdominal fat pads. My clients feel the difference from the very first session.

testimonials.name: Sárközi Kinga
testimonials.text: With the microneedle RF nano head, I achieve <mark>fantastic skin renewal results even without needles</mark>. I use the HIFU cartridges for deeper wrinkles and body treatments. One device, two technologies – this was the perfect solution for my salon.

testimonials.name: Kovács Andrea
testimonials.text: I was skeptical at first, but the NOFILTER 7D <mark>exceeded my expectations</mark>. My clients specifically seek HIFU facelift treatments, and with the microneedle RF complement, I can achieve comprehensive results. The training was very thorough – I learned everything about safe use.

expertQuote.quote: The NOFILTER 7D is unique in combining the deep-layer lifting effect of HIFU with the surface renewal power of microneedle RF. This dual technology enables targeted treatment of every layer of the skin within a single session – from the SMAS layer to the epidermis.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What's the difference between the NOFILTER 7D and the HYPERNOVA?
faq.answer: The NOFILTER 7D combines HIFU and microneedle RF technology, optimized primarily for facelifting, skin rejuvenation, and targeted body treatments. The HYPERNOVA contains HIFU, RF, and EMS muscle stimulation, focusing more on body sculpting and muscle stimulation. The NOFILTER 7D cartridges cover 7 depths, and the microneedle RF provides personalized treatment with 4 heads.

faq.question: Is the HIFU treatment painful?
faq.answer: During treatment, mild warmth and tingling are experienced, but most clients tolerate it well. No anesthesia is required. With microneedle RF treatments, minimal prickling is felt; treatment with the nano head is completely painless.

faq.question: How many shots can a HIFU cartridge deliver?
faq.answer: Each HIFU cartridge can deliver 10,000 shots. For facial treatments, this typically enables 15–20 full treatments; for body treatments, 8–12 treatments.

faq.question: When are results visible?
faq.answer: With HIFU treatment, alongside immediate firming, the full result develops over 2–3 months due to increased collagen production. The effect typically lasts 6–12 months. Microneedle RF treatment results become complete after 3–5 sessions in a course format.

faq.question: Is there recovery time after treatment?
faq.answer: After HIFU treatment, minimal redness may occur, which subsides within hours. After microneedle RF, 24–48 hours of mild redness is possible. In both cases, the client can immediately continue their daily activities.

faq.question: What training comes with the device?
faq.answer: A one-day official adult education course, free with device purchase. The training covers HIFU and microneedle RF technology operation, correct use of cartridges and heads, and treatment protocols. We issue a FAR-system generated certificate with B-number.

faq.question: How quickly does the NOFILTER 7D pay for itself?
faq.answer: HIFU facelift treatment prices typically range from 20,000–50,000 Ft, body treatments from 15,000–35,000 Ft. With 6–10 treatments per week, the device generally pays for itself within 3–4 months. Use our ROI calculator for exact figures!
